2606.21337.title: DataClaw0: Agentic Tailoring Multimodal Data from Raw Streams
2606.21337.paper_summary: Massive unstructured multimodal streams suffer from high "data entropy," impeding both efficient human knowledge acquisition and high-quality AI post-training. Existing passive annotation paradigms, heavily reliant on heuristic rules or general VLMs, are costly, monotonous, and fail to unlock the deep procedural logic embedded in raw data. We elevate data processing to a learnable capability, proposing a paradigm shift towards Agentic Data Tailoring, which actively refining and structuring data to align with diverse user and downstream intents. To overcome the data scarcity bottleneck in training such high-order capabilities, we design a two-stage pipeline grounding generative semantic synthesis in deterministic Factual Anchors, yielding a large-scale dataset spanning five core physical and digital domains. Building upon this, $\text{DataClaw}_0$-9B model synergizes Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), achieving robust alignment with complex refinement and tailoring intents. To systematically quantify this capability, we construct $\text{DataClaw}_0$-val, the first benchmark dedicated to data refinement. Crucially, we adopt downstream post-training as the ultimate validation touchstone. Evaluations on video generation, real-world VQA, and GUI navigation confirm that $\text{DataClaw}_0$ delivers high-information-density tailored data, facilitating efficient model adaptation to new tasks under limited training data regimes. Project page: https://czjdsg.github.io/MakeAnyData
2606.21337.paper_summary_zh: 大規模的非結構化多模態數據流遭受高「數據熵」的困擾，妨礙了高效的人類知識獲取和高品質的AI後訓練。現有的被動標註範式，過度依賴啟發式規則或通用的VLM，成本高昂、單調乏味，且未能解鎖原始數據中深層的程序邏輯。我們將數據處理提升為一種可學習的能力，提出一種向代理數據定制的範式轉變，主動地精煉和結構化數據，以符合多樣化的用戶和下游意圖。為了克服訓練此類高階能力中的數據稀缺瓶頸，我們設計了一個兩階段的管道，將生成語義合成基於確定性的事實錨點，產生一個涵蓋五個核心物理和數字領域的大規模數據集。在此基礎上，$\text{DataClaw}_0$-9B模型將監督微調（SFT）與群體相對政策優化（GRPO）協同，實現與複雜精煉和定制意圖的強健對齊。為了系統地量化這一能力，我們構建了$\text{DataClaw}_0$-val，這是首個專門針對數據精煉的基準。關鍵是，我們將下游後訓練作為最終的驗證基準。在視頻生成、現實世界VQA和GUI導航的評估中，確認$\text{DataClaw}_0$提供高信息密度的定制數據，促進模型在有限訓練數據環境下對新任務的高效適應。項目頁面：https://czjdsg.github.io/MakeAnyData
2606.21337.author: Cong Wan et.al.
2606.21337.authors: Cong Wan, Zeyu Guo, Zijian Cai, Jiangyang Li, SongLin Dong, Lin Peng, Xiangyang Luo, Zhiheng Ma, Yihong Gong
